channel.title: Journal of Contemporary Antisemitism
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Contemporary Antisemitism

item.title: Contents
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca-2024-toc0702

item.title: Editorial
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.2.161

item.title: When Military Targeting of Hamas Combatants Was Misrepresented as Genocide: An Open-Source Data Analysis with a Focus on Israeli Airstrikes in the Gaza Urban Warfare, 2023–2024
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.2.162

item.title: The Crisis of Critique and Academic Antizionism—Before and After October 7
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.2.163

item.title: From 1967 to October 7: The History of an Antisemitic Cartoon from the Civil Rights Era to the Harvard Encampment
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.2.164

item.title: Can Jews Speak Freely on Ivy League Campuses?
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.2.165

item.title: “Keeping our little corner clean”: An Interview with Matthew Feldman on Antisemitism after October 7
item.description: Article by Lesley Klaff DOI: https://doi.org/10.26613/jca/7.2.166
